prestazioni: Mercedes-AMG M14 E Performance (HPP-tuned) PU106C 1.6L V6 hybrid turbocharged power unit with a custom Red Bull Racing-spec Garrett GTX5544R 106mm turbocharger, billet compressor wheel, and 3D-printed titanium turbine housing for optimized exhaust gas flow at 15,000 RPM

Ohlins TTX46 MkII 4-way adjustable dampers with RB20-specific valving and carbon-fiber pushrods, paired with Red Bull Racing’s proprietary ‘Flexi-Wing’ adaptive aerodynamics system for dynamic ride height adjustment under braking and acceleration

AP Racing CP9660-4000 carbon-carbon brake discs with RB20-specific caliper pistons (6x40mm front, 4x36mm rear) and Ferodo DS4000 brake pads, integrated with a bespoke brake-by-wire system for torque vectoring and regenerative braking optimization
estetica: Red Bull Racing RB20-specific ‘Shark Fin’ engine cover in 3D-printed titanium with integrated cooling louvers and a matte carbon-fiber weave finish, designed for maximum airflow to the MGU-H and turbocharger

RB20-exclusive ‘Bull Horn’ front wing endplates with adjustable Gurney flaps and a multi-element cascade design, constructed from TeXtreme spread-tow carbon fiber for reduced weight and increased downforce at high yaw angles

Custom RB20 livery featuring a ‘Liquid Chrome’ vinyl wrap by 3M (Series 1080) with Red Bull Racing’s proprietary ‘Chameleon’ pigment shift technology, paired with BBS FI21 18-inch forged magnesium wheels in a gold-anodized finish with Pirelli P Zero Racing slicks (305/660-R18 front, 405/670-R18 rear)
